problems.title: Invalid username
problems.detail: The provided username is not valid. Use 3 to 100 characters containing only letters, digits, underscores, hyphens, or dots.

problems.title: Insecure password
problems.detail: The provided password does not meet the security requirements. Password must be at least 8 characters long and include uppercase, lowercase, and numeric characters.

problems.title: Email already exists
problems.detail: The provided email address is already associated with an existing account.

problems.title: Username already exists
problems.detail: The provided username is already in use.

problems.title: Invalid email
problems.detail: The provided email is not in a valid format.

problems.title: User not found
problems.detail: No user exists with the provided identifier.

problems.title: Invalid credentials
problems.detail: The provided email or password is incorrect.

problems.title: Invalid token
problems.detail: The provided session cookie is invalid or no longer exists.

problems.title: Expired token
problems.detail: The provided session cookie has expired.

problems.title: No user currently logged in
problems.detail: No session cookie was provided with the request.

problems.title: Case not found
problems.detail: No case exists with the provided identifier.

problems.title: Case access denied
problems.detail: The authenticated user does not have permission to access this case.

problems.title: Access denied
problems.detail: The authenticated user does not have permission to access this resource.

problems.title: Invalid case status
problems.detail: The provided case status must be non-empty and at most 50 characters.

problems.title: Invalid case description
problems.detail: The provided case description must be at most 5000 characters.

problems.title: Accident data not found
problems.detail: No accident workflow resource exists with the provided identifier.

problems.title: Invalid accident data
problems.detail: The provided accident workflow data failed validation.

problems.title: Measurement processing failed
problems.detail: The measurement engine could not process the image evidence. Check that the Python script exists, the image paths are readable, Python dependencies are installed, and ruler tick marks are visible in the images.

problems.title: Report generation failed
problems.detail: The backend could not generate the analysis report artifact from the stored case and analysis data.

problems.title: Duplicate vehicle
problems.detail: A vehicle with the provided license plate already exists in this case.

problems.title: Related resource mismatch
problems.detail: The provided related resources do not belong to the same accident case.

problems.title: External data unavailable
problems.detail: The external provider could not return weather or scene data.
